title: Infosys completes transfer of 90% shareholding in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina
detailed_summary: Infosys Limited completed the transfer of 90% of the shareholding held in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina, a majority owned subsidiary, to Infosys Nova Holdings LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys, on January 28, 2026. The document does not disclose transaction value, financial impact, strategic rationale, or any change in ultimate Infosys control.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Limited completed transfer of 90% of the shareholding held in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina.
Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina is described as a majority owned subsidiary.
The shareholding was transferred to Infosys Nova Holdings LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.
The transfer was completed on January 28, 2026.
